title: Classic Sword Block
description: Replaces shields with swords to simulate the old 1.8 sword blocking mechanic. Enhance PvP combat, block, and parry mechanics. Rename shields with sword names for customizable textures.
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/wN63Hjt.png)
# Overview:
Replaces shields with swords to simulate the classic 1.8 sword blocking mechanic.

# Customizable textures:
Rename the shield to any sword name (e.g., "diamond sword") to change its texture according to the sword material. Supports over 10 languages, including:

- English
- Spanish
- French
- Russian
- Portuguese
- German
- Italian
- Chinese
- Japanese
- Korean
# Requirements:
OptiFine or CIT Resewn mod is required for the full functionality of customizable sword textures when renaming shields. Without them, the shield will default to the iron sword texture.
